scripts.db:generate: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs npx prisma generate --schema packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:push: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs npx prisma db push --schema packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:migrate: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs npx prisma migrate dev --schema packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:deploy: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs npx prisma migrate deploy --schema packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:studio: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs npx prisma studio --schema packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run lint && npm run build
scripts.dev:raw: concurrently -n api,worker,web -c auto "npm run dev -w @football-ai/api" "npm run dev -w @football-ai/worker" "npm run dev -w @football-ai/web"
